nodes.name: Madrean Sky Islands
nodes.summary: Madrean Sky Islands是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括瑰丽蜂鸟、Arizona woodpecker、Sulphur-bellied flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

nodes.name: 新萊昂州
nodes.summary: 新萊昂州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括Scaled quail、Tawny-collared nightjar、蓝喉宝石蜂鸟等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 塔毛利帕斯州
nodes.summary: 塔毛利帕斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、Scaled quail、普通潜鸟等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 尤卡坦半岛
nodes.summary: 尤卡坦半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联19种鸟类，包括Singing quail、眼斑吐綬雞、美洲紅鸛等19种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Sulphur-bellied flycatcher
nodes.summary: Sulphur-bellied flycatcher（Sulphur-bellied flycatcher，学名 Myiodynastes luteiventris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The sulphur-bellied flycatcher breeds in the Madrean sky islands of southeastern Arizona and south from there through western Mexico to central Costa Rica

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also breeds from southern Nuevo León and southern Tamaulipas in northeastern Mexico south through eastern Mexico, including the Yucatán Peninsula, to join the western range in Guatemala

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also breeds from southern Nuevo León and southern Tamaulipas in northeastern Mexico south through eastern Mexico, including the Yucatán Peninsula, to join the western range in Guatemala

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also breeds from southern Nuevo León and southern Tamaulipas in northeastern Mexico south through eastern Mexico, including the Yucatán Peninsula, to join the western range in Guatemala

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It has occurred as a vagrant in Nevada and Massachusetts, and in Ontario, New Brunswick, and Newfoundland in Canada. In South America it has occurred as a vagrant in Brazil, Chile, and Venezuela. In its breeding range the sulphur-bellied flycatcher inhabits deciduous forest, gallery forest, and the edges of evergreen forest in the tropical and subtropical zones

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: On its wintering grounds it mostly inhabits forest along rivers but also occurs in disturbed and secondary forest and in the edges and canopy of unbroken tropical forest. In Mexico and northern Central America it ranges in elevation mostly between sea level and about . In Costa Rica it breeds up to but not in the Caribbean lowlands; migrants are found up to . In Colombia it is found below .{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In Arizona it typically is found in riparian canyons
